src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Modernize Javadoc comment style and capitalization.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
* This is a helper Java class that provides an alternative to creating a web.xml.
 * This will be invoked only when the application is deployed to a servlet container like Tomcat, Jboss etc.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
* This is a helper Java class that provides an alternative to creating a {@code web.xml}.
 * This will be invoked only when the application is deployed to a Servlet container like Tomcat, JBoss etc.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace block comment with single-line comment for brevity.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: // set a default to use when no profile is configured.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace field injection with constructor injection for the Environment bean to adhere to modern Spring Boot best practices.
Remove the @EnableDiscoveryClient annotation as it is no longer required or compatible with the new service discovery setup.
Refactor the main method to remove the throws UnknownHostException declaration and handle host resolution internally.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: public static void main(String[] args) throws UnknownHostException {

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Extract application startup logging into a dedicated method and update the log message format to include protocol and context path.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for the Environment dependency.
Update import to use JHipsterConstants instead of local Constants class.
Update profile check to use Spring's Profiles.of() API instead of varargs string.
Refactor pointcut to use annotation-based matching for Spring beans.
Extract logger retrieval into a helper method to avoid repeating class name logic.
Update logging statements to use the dynamic logger and remove redundant class name from message.
Switch from field injection to constructor injection for dependency injection.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Field injection is discouraged in modern Spring applications and may be flagged by static analysis tools or strict coding standards, though it is not strictly a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused javax.inject.Inject import.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The annotation is no longer used in the class after switching to constructor injection.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Expand wildcard import for Spring scheduling annotations to explicit imports.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Wildcard imports are often discouraged by code style guides and IDEs for clarity and maintainability.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace field injection with constructor injection for required dependencies to adhere to modern Spring best practices.
Switch service discovery source from DiscoveryClient to Registration for Hazelcast clustering configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The code structure changes to rely on the Registration bean (Spring Cloud) rather than querying DiscoveryClient directly for the service ID, aligning with Spring Cloud updates.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update profile checking to use JHipsterConstants and Profiles.of() instead of raw string constants.
Externalize Hazelcast cache configuration properties from JHipsterProperties instead of hardcoding them.
Add optional GitProperties and BuildProperties injection for cache key generation.
Register a PrefixedKeyGenerator bean using Git and Build properties.
Remove static HazelcastInstance field and getter, relying on Spring-managed bean lifecycle instead.
Add ManagementCenterConfig to Hazelcast configuration.
Add null-check for Hazelcast instance to prevent re-initialization.
Update the login regex to enforce stricter email or username formats.
Remove unused Spring profile constants that are no longer managed in this class.
Rename SYSTEM_ACCOUNT constant to SYSTEM.
Add a new constant for the default language.
Format the private constructor body to be empty on one line.
Replace deprecated javax.inject.Inject with constructor injection for Spring dependency management.
Refactor H2 TCP server bean to use JHipster's H2ConfigurationHelper for port management.
Update profile constant reference from local Constants to JHipsterConstants.
Remove manual Liquibase bean configuration in favor of Spring Boot auto-configuration.
Remove explicit Hibernate4Module bean definition as it is handled by auto-configuration or no longer needed.
Remove unused import for RateLimitingRepository as the bean definition was removed.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compile error: unused import or import of non-existent class if the class was also removed/renamed, but primarily cleanup of dead code.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update JavaDoc to reflect the switch from Cassandra-based rate limiting to Bucket4J.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
For this filter to work, you need to have:
     * <ul>
     * <li>A working Cassandra cluster
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: This uses Bucket4J to limit the API calls, see {@link io.github.jhipster.sample.gateway.ratelimiting.RateLimitingFilter}.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Fix whitespace formatting in method declaration.
Remove unused imports related to removed functionality.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Imports for RelaxedPropertyResolver, Environment, InterceptorRegistry, and WebMvcConfigurerAdapter are no longer needed after removing EnvironmentAware and extending WebMvcConfigurer.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: import org.springframework.boot.bind.RelaxedPropertyResolver; import org.springframework.context.EnvironmentAware; import org.springframework.core.env.Environment; import org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.InterceptorRegistry; import org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.WebMvcConfigurerAdapter;

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify import statements using wildcard.
Remove explicit bean name from @Bean annotation.
Replace manual Logback appender configuration with JHipster utility methods to support modern logging features like JSON formatting and TCP transport.
Switch from field injection to constructor injection for Spring beans and configuration properties.
Remove dependency on javax.annotation.PostConstruct in favor of constructor initialization.
Remove direct dependency on net.logstash.logback library classes by delegating to JHipster utilities.
Remove direct dependency on ch.qos.logback.classic.AsyncAppender by delegating to JHipster utilities.
Remove direct dependency on net.logstash.logback.stacktrace.ShortenedThrowableConverter by delegating to JHipster utilities.
Add dependency on Jackson ObjectMapper for serializing custom log fields.
Add dependency on Spring Cloud RefreshScope to allow logging configuration refresh.
Add dependency on Spring Boot BuildProperties to include version in logs.
Add dependency on JHipster LoggingUtils static methods.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for dependencies.
Remove deprecated SecurityEvaluationContextExtension bean.
Remove manual AuthenticationManagerBuilder configuration in favor of Spring Boot auto-configuration.
Switch from Http401UnauthorizedEntryPoint to SecurityProblemSupport for exception handling.
Add CORS filter to the security chain.
Add Content Security Policy header configuration.
